detail: f1k-bundle.tgz sha 48de149f6c768750 (committed harness $HOME/f1k layout: f1k_worker.sh e438ba4b + bringup_gcp.sh + f1k_gcp.py + kae-patch-draft[kae 11f8b458] + dump-patch[dump fb5d2f35, kae_dump.h 6ce77601] + analysis/f1k.py). vm_setup.sh sha ba7cd856 (on-VM: install google-cloud-cli[gsutil]+mdadm+build; RAID0 3x local NVMe -> /mnt/nvme[1125GiB>383.8GB estate]; unpack bundle; place ../../kae-patch-draft copy; pre-clone pristine colibri@a78a06fc as COLIBRI_TREE[blob-verify]; launch COMMITTED worker VERBATIM via run-worker.sh with env COLIBRI_TREE/KOT_F1K_BUCKET/COLIBRI_GIT_URL/KOT_F1K_SPOT_RATE=0.19392). watchdog.sh sha 8efa0f65 (control-box). All bash -n clean.

3 layers: (1) control-box durable watchdog (AUTHORITATIVE real DELETE; VM storage-rw token cannot self-delete): nohup on EC2 box, polls GCS heartbeat+VM status every 5min, DELETES on heartbeat=FAILED* OR status TERMINATED/STOPPING/STOPPED/SUSPENDED OR absolute deadline 14h; does NOT delete on DONE-READY-FOR-ONBOX-REVIEW (holds VM for coordinator a/c+affordability finalization, deadline still caps). (2) guest max-lifetime self-halt: root nohup sleep 15h -> shutdown -h (stops vCPU/RAM billing even if control box dies). (3) on-worker-exit: FAILED->shutdown -h +2; DONE->hold for review. Provision uses --instance-termination-action STOP so spot preemption also pauses billing. Worst-case residual if ALL of watchdog+coordinator fail: VM TERMINATED at 15h then boot-pd idle ~$0.014/h until coordinator teardown.

check: gsutil iam ch serviceAccount SA:roles/storage.objectAdmin on bucket
detail: The IAM grant (needed for the committed worker to read/write the GCS estate-mirror + heartbeat) was DENIED by the auto-mode permission classifier as an IAM elevation reserved for human review. I did NOT attempt to work around it (project-level grant, alternate role, or copying user creds would all be the same elevation the gate protects). This is a genuine human-gated action. Path X (preferred): maintainer grants the SA bucket IAM, then re-run the COMMITTED worker verbatim (full GCS preemption-resilience). Path Y (alt, coordinator decision): make the estate-mirror step non-fatal (ops edit) so bring-up completes without GCS (loses preemption-resilience + on-box-only artifacts). Surfacing for coordinator/maintainer.
